approval_gate: No launch, pod acquisition, push, protected auth request, merge, or issue closure is authorized by this prepared spec.

shared_contract.gpu_cloud: RunPod secure cloud RTX 5090, pending user confirmation

linear_no_bias.basis: support-whitened generalized-HVP/Lanczos candidate scaled by beta^2

affine.basis: support-whitened generalized-HVP/Lanczos candidate scaled by beta^2

caveats: The finite Adam rows materialize epsilon from clean-rollout pre-step features; they are not yet true live-perturbed closed-loop finite-policy training.
Cap, trust-radius, boundary, selected norm/radius, and radius-gradient-pressure quantities are diagnostic-only.
The invalid 7ea17b8 cap/trust-radius-derived ~4.13e8 floors must not be used for launch planning.
